commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces regex-backed `tools.agentToAgent.allow` wildcard matching in session visibility with a segment-based matcher and adds focused wildcard and adversarial-input tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main constructs a wildcard regex in `createAgentToAgentPolicy`, and a timeout-bounded probe using that exact construction did not complete within 6 seconds on an adversarial allow pattern.
commands.review_followup: No automated code repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer/security review of an authorization-boundary matcher plus normal CI gating.

target.title: fix(security): replace regex wildcard matching with linear-time glob in session-visibility
target.author: sebtardif
